column3: N.B : In PLFS 2025 (Panel - 5) district was basic stratum for nearly 500 districts; NSS regions were formed as basic stratum where districts were too small to form basic stratum. Each basic stratum is the sub-state level stratum formed which has a popular geographycal identity eg. district or nss-region. Design based estimate and design based rse can be generated for each basic stratum.
